scenario.name: B2BUA B-leg re-INVITE UAS
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:bob@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=bob 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv

INVITE [$remote_contact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:bob@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: <[$remote_from_uri]>;tag=[$remote_tag] Call-ID: [$dialog_callid] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:bob@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/b2bua-bleg-reinvite-test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=bob 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendonly

ACK [$remote_contact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:bob@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] To: <[$remote_from_uri]>;tag=[$remote_tag] Call-ID: [$dialog_callid] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
